mapper.select: select date_format(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') as stat_date, count(1) as order_count from jst_order_main where create_time >= #{startTime} and create_time < #{endTime} and order_status != 'cancelled' and del_flag = '0' group by date_format(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') order by stat_date asc

select date_format(pay_time, '%Y-%m-%d') as stat_date, coalesce(sum(net_pay_amount), 0.00) as revenue from jst_order_main where pay_time >= #{startTime} and pay_time < #{endTime} and order_status in ('paid', 'reviewing', 'in_service', 'aftersale', 'completed', 'closed') and del_flag = '0' group by date_format(pay_time, '%Y-%m-%d') order by stat_date asc

select date_format(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') as stat_date, count(1) as enroll_count from jst_enroll_record where create_time >= #{startTime} and create_time < #{endTime} and del_flag = '0' group by date_format(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') order by stat_date asc

select c.contest_id, c.contest_name, count(e.enroll_id) as enroll_count, coalesce(o.total_revenue, 0.00) as total_revenue from jst_contest c left join jst_enroll_record e on e.contest_id = c.contest_id and e.del_flag = '0' left join ( select contest_id, coalesce(sum(net_pay_amount), 0.00) as total_revenue from jst_order_main where order_status in ('paid', 'reviewing', 'in_service', 'aftersale', 'completed', 'closed') and del_flag = '0' group by contest_id ) o on o.contest_id = c.contest_id where c.del_flag = '0' group by c.contest_id, c.contest_name, o.total_revenue having count(e.enroll_id) > 0 or coalesce(o.total_revenue, 0.00) > 0 order by enroll_count desc, total_revenue desc, c.contest_id asc limit #{limit}

select c.channel_id, c.channel_name, coalesce(b.student_count, 0) as student_count, coalesce(l.total_rebate, 0.00) as total_rebate from jst_channel c left join ( select channel_id, count(1) as student_count from jst_student_channel_binding where status = 'active' and del_flag = '0' group by channel_id ) b on b.channel_id = c.channel_id left join ( select channel_id, coalesce(sum(rebate_amount), 0.00) as total_rebate from jst_rebate_ledger where status != 'rolled_back' and del_flag = '0' group by channel_id ) l on l.channel_id = c.channel_id where c.del_flag = '0' and (coalesce(b.student_count, 0) > 0 or coalesce(l.total_rebate, 0.00) != 0) order by total_rebate desc, c.channel_id asc limit #{limit}

select ( select count(1) from jst_contest where audit_status = 'pending' and del_flag = '0' ) as pending_contest_audit, ( select count(1) from jst_enroll_record where audit_status = 'pending' and del_flag = '0' ) as pending_enroll_audit, ( select count(1) from jst_refund_record where status = 'pending' and del_flag = '0' ) as pending_refund, ( select count(1) from jst_rebate_settlement where status = 'pending' and del_flag = '0' ) as pending_withdraw, ( select count(1) from jst_event_partner_apply where apply_status = 'pending' and del_flag = '0' ) as pending_partner_apply, ( select count(1) from jst_channel_auth_apply where apply_status = 'pending' and del_flag = '0' ) as pending_channel_auth
